title: Demo
description: A simple minecraft mod that switches your game into demo mode
body:
# Demo
After you buy Minecraft, you can no longer play the demo mode!

This mod aims to fix that.

# What it does
It switches Minecraft into demo mode

# Images

![Minecraft with the demo mod installed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c040583d22846d7a5c693c3b7a162d2ebbb630.png)
